reason: Browser automation feature successfully executed: agent opened browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved page title, and returned response mentioning "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully, displaying SuperAgent interface with sidebar containing three agents and main content area showing "Your Agents"
Found and clicked the "QA-20260509-010648-5jpl" agent in the sidebar - Agent page opened successfully, displaying chat interface with message input field, agent settings, and configuration panels
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in the input field - Message entered correctly in the textbox, visible before sending
Clicked Send message button - Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", "Browser Page Title Inspection" session created and showed "working" status
Waited 180 seconds (3 minutes) for agent response - Agent completed work in 7 seconds and returned response

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Response clearly states "The page title is "Example Domain"." The browser preview panel on the right also shows the actual example.com page with its title. Two browser tool calls are visible: "Open Browser https://example.com" and "Browser Command $ get title", both marked with green checkmarks indicating successful execution
